name: insert_after_symbol
description:
Use this to insert code after a class/method/function definition.
Don't use to insert after assignments (constants, fields).

name_path.title: Name Path
name_path.description: Name path of the symbol after which to insert content.

relative_path.title: Relative Path
relative_path.description: The relative path to the file containing the symbol.

body.title: Body
body.description:
The body/content to be inserted. The inserted code shall begin with the next line after
the symbol.
